prs.title: fix: AWS Product Selector X button deselection
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small bug fix adding deselection logic to an existing component with 25 lines in a single file.

prs.title: feat: AWS Product Selector for Product-Based Fields
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Solid new feature introducing a new AWS Product Selector component with integration into FieldCard and the component showcase across 4 files and 335 lines.

prs.title: feat: Product Field Remapping and Readiness System Enhancements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant cross-cutting enhancement touching schema definitions, seed data, readiness layout and page logic, FieldCard, and multiple docs, representing meaningful architectural changes to the readiness system.

stories.name: AWS Product Selection & Readiness Mapping
stories.rationale: Delivered end-to-end AWS product selection capability, including a new product selector UI component, deselection fix, and the underlying product field remapping and readiness system enhancements that power the feature.
